title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind announced that SynthID, an imperceptible watermarking technology for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners. SynthID enables detection and attribution of synthetic media through embedded watermarks.
